Package com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.impl.custombetentities

Class CalculationFilterImpl

java.lang.Object
com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.impl.custombetentities.CalculationFilterImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
CalculationFilter
public class CalculationFilterImpl extends Object implements CalculationFilter
Implements methods used to provide a probability calculation
